alias b="build.py"
alias g="git"
alias j.root="cd ${VKFWD_ROOT}/"
alias j.build="cd ${VKFWD_ROOT}/build/"
alias j.dev="cd ${VKFWD_ROOT}/dev/"
alias j.bin="cd ${VKFWD_ROOT}/dev/bin/"
alias j.env="cd ${VKFWD_ROOT}/dev/env/"
alias j.src="cd ${VKFWD_ROOT}/src/"
alias j.vkfwd="cd ${VKFWD_ROOT}/src/vkfwd/"
alias j.test="cd ${VKFWD_ROOT}/dev/test/"
